allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json lines = sys.stdin.readlines\(\) for line in lines[-20:]: try: d = json.loads\(line\) role = d.get\('role',''\) if role in \('user','assistant'\): content = d.get\('content',''\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\('type'\) == 'text': print\(f'[{role}]:', c['text'][:300]\) elif isinstance\(content, str\): print\(f'[{role}]:', content[:300]\) except: pass ")
